zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay於1325年2月8日出生在英國史洛普爾斯托可賽時，他的父親Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle11322歲，母親Hawise D'Ervassal25歲。他和Lady Joan de Sibbeton至少有4個兒子。他去世於1382年2月17日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay于1325年2月8日出生在英国史洛普爾斯托可賽时，他的父亲Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle11322岁，母亲Hawise D'Ervassal25岁。他和Lady Joan de Sibbeton至少有4个儿子。他去世于1382年2月17日在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ludlow,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from a place in Shropshire, so named from the Old English river name Hlūde (from hlūd ‘loud, roaring’) referring to the Teme river + hlāw ‘hill’. This name was taken Ireland in the 13th and 17th centuries. See also Laidlaw .

variants.name: Laidlaw
meanings: Scottish: Border surname found mainly around Selkirk and the vales of Ettrick and Yarrow; a Scottish development of   Ludlow  .

variants.name: Ledlow
meanings: English, Irish, or Scottish: variant of   Ludlow   or   Laidlaw  .

variants.name: Ludlam
meanings: English: possibly from a misreading of w as m in Ludelawe, a recorded medieval spelling of the placename Ludlow in Shropshire. Compare Ludlow .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay was born on 8 February 1325, in Stokesay, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle, was 11322 and his mother, Hawise D'Ervassal, was 25. He had at least 4 sons with Lady Joan de Sibbeton. He died on 17 February 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay est né le 8 février 1325, à Stokesay, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle, avait 11322 ans et sa mère, Hawise D'Ervassal, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Lady Joan de Sibbeton. Il est décédé le 17 février 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay am 8. Februar 1325 in Stokesay, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle 11322 und seine Mutter Hawise D'Ervassal 25. Er hatte mit Lady Joan de Sibbeton mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 17. Februar 1382 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay è nato il il 8 febbraio 1325 nel Stokesay, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle, aveva 11322 anni e il suo madre, Hawise D'Ervassal, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Lady Joan de Sibbeton. Morì il 17 febbraio 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesayが1325年2月8日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアストケサイで生まれた時，父Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castleは11322歳，母Hawise D'Ervassalは25歳であった。彼はLady Joan de Sibbetonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1382年2月17日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay(이)가 1325년 2월 8일 영국 슈럽실르 스토케지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle(은)는 11322세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise D'Ervassal(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Lady Joan de Sibbeton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1382년 2월 17일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.8 February 1325–17 February 1382: 8 de fevereiro de 1325–17 de fevereiro de 1382
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay nasceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1325, em Stokesay, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle, tinha 11322 anos e sua mãe, Hawise D'Ervassal, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Lady Joan de Sibbeton. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1382, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay родился 8 февраля 1325 г. в местности стокесеи, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle было 11322 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise D'Ervassal, 25. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Lady Joan de Sibbeton. Он умер 17 февраля 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

sm.Between 1358 and 1377: mai le 1358 e o'o I le 1377

es.8 February 1325–17 February 1382: 8 de febrero de 1325–17 de febrero de 1382
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay nació el 8 de febrero de 1325, en Stokesay, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle, tenía 11322 años y su mamá, Hawise D'Ervassal, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Lady Joan de Sibbeton. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
